name: Q-Gold Resources Ltd.
description: Q-Gold Resources Ltd. is a mineral exploration and development company headquartered in Toronto, Canada. The company is focused on advancing a dual-asset gold platform, including the high-grade Mine Centre project in Ontario and the Quartz Mountain project in Oregon, USA. Q-Gold explores for gold, silver, and other precious metal deposits, holding significant mining claims and leases. By leveraging its strategic assets and geological potential, the company aims to become a prominent Tier-One gold developer in North America, targeting near-term growth and domestic production through systematic exploration, mapping, and drilling programs.
